data.content:
Implementation review rejected. 1. [crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:52] [crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:343] [crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:350] [crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:359]  marks shell completions as fixed immediately after writing files, but for zsh and bash it only prints manual instructions to add ~/.zfunc to fpath or source ~/.bash_completion.d. In those common setups autocomplete is still not installed after the command exits, which violates the knot requirement that doctor tell you whether autocomplete is installed and that  fixes it.
